name: Kubernetes
description: Connection definition for registering a Kubernetes cluster (discovered from a kubeconfig context) as a first-class Meshery connection.

server.title: API Server
server.description: Kubernetes API server endpoint for the cluster context.

name.title: Context Name
name.description: Context name from the kubeconfig that identifies the cluster.

kubeconfig.title: Kubeconfig
kubeconfig.description: The kubeconfig content that authenticates to the cluster context.
